hyperedges.label: Advisor Pipeline: Worker fetches context, calls Claude, SMS replies
CTA Broadcast Flow: Admin sends SMS, recipients reply, quorum triggers all-clear
Grain Marketing Decision Data: bids + contracts + plan + storage rate
Signal Evaluation and SMS Alert Pipeline
Bushel Data Refresh and Advisor Context Pipeline
Confirmation Lifecycle: Evaluate to Collect to Remind to Pulse
SMS Test Script Variants (with/without webhook, plain)
Scripts that Write to state/confirmations.json
USDA Alert Generation Pipeline (surprise → predict → format)
SMS Alert and Y/N Confirmation Pipeline
Bushel/Ritchie Data Refresh and Advisor Bundle Pipeline
Cloudflare Worker to Git Mirror Pattern
SMS Confirmation Pipeline: evaluate.py → TextBelt → Cloudflare Worker → GitHub Actions → collect_reply.py
IB IV Data Flow: IB Gateway → refresh_ib_iv.py → ib_iv.json → hedge.html
Unified Dashboard Shell: index, hedge, home, admin, books, farm-ops all share the same CSS design system
